member.name: T:TpIngSoftware_GestionDeEspaciosDeportivos.IRefreshable
member.summary: Implemented by UI forms and user controls that can reload their displayed data on demand.
member.remarks: Called by parent forms after write operations (create, update, delete) complete so that child panels reflect the latest state without a full form re-open.

member.name: M:TpIngSoftware_GestionDeEspaciosDeportivos.IRefreshable.RefreshData
member.summary: Reloads data from the BLL layer and rebinds all UI controls.

member.name: T:TpIngSoftware_GestionDeEspaciosDeportivos.ITranslatable
member.summary: Implemented by UI forms and user controls that support runtime language switching.
member.remarks: Called by the application shell when the user changes the active language. Implementations should re-apply all localizable string resources to their controls without recreating or re-initializing the form.

member.name: M:TpIngSoftware_GestionDeEspaciosDeportivos.ITranslatable.UpdateLanguage
member.summary: Re-applies the current language strings to all translatable UI controls.

member.name: M:TpIngSoftware_GestionDeEspaciosDeportivos.Program.Main
member.summary: The main entry point for the application.

member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:TpIngSoftware_GestionDeEspaciosDeportivos.Properties.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:TpIngSoftware_GestionDeEspaciosDeportivos.Properties.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.
